findings.description: The exam callout box contains three structured bullet points summarizing BSC viewpoints, CSF, and KPI that are not extracted as structured content inside the figure — only the bare caption '試験にはコレが出る！' is stored. The bullets carry exam-critical content but are visual and not further broken out.

reviewer_notes: R1.1 fix confirmed: figure::p129::3 caption jp is '試験にはコレが出る！' as required. The BSC table (4 data rows plus header) matches the image including 財務/顧客/業務プロセス/学習と成長 viewpoints, CSF, KPI, and score values. CSF and KPI term definitions are detailed and accurate. Only gap is callout bullet text not extracted as structured content, which is low severity.
